B1: Anime Focus

Source topic: Anime Focus: Frieren and the quiet side of fantasy stories

Frieren: Beyond Journey's End is a fantasy anime about an elf mage who begins to understand human feelings after her old adventure ends. The story follows quiet travel scenes, m...
